subject: [PATCH 1/4] arm64: request contpte-sized folios for exec memory

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: The patch is technically correct, but the author should consider adding a comment to explain why this change is necessary and how it improves performance.

2026-03-10.patch_summary: This patch series adjusts the folio size requested for executable memory on arm64 to match the hardware's contiguous page table entry (contpte) size, which varies depending on the base page size.
